creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #0)

Hi, Eugene!

There is obviously not enough information.

In normal setup libaesni-intel-samba4.so shouldn't be built anymore, so there is something non-common with your system.

I'd suspect that you have outdated gcrypt library. Are you building in the poudriere or on a live system?

Basically, I need more info.
